resources.string: Make a wish that troubles your soul,\nand shake the ball — fate will answer…
Number of shakes required to get an answer
How long the phone vibrates to signal an answer

string-array.name: instructions
string-array.item: Make a wish that troubles your soul,\nand shake the ball — fate will answer…
Focus on your question\nand shake the ball of fate…
Close your eyes, ask with your heart,\nand shake the oracle\'s ball…
Ask what gives you no peace,\nand shake the ball — behold the answer…
Whisper your question to the universe\nand shake the ball of fate…
Think of the wish you keep silent,\nand shake the ball…
Let the question into your heart\nand shake the ball — a prophecy is coming…
Concentrate on what is hidden\nand shake the oracle\'s ball…
Ask what burns inside you,\nand shake the ball — fate will speak…
Trust in fate, make your question,\nand shake the ball of prophecy…

string-array.name: responses
string-array.item: As I see it,\nyes
It is\ncertain
It is\ndecidedly so
Most\nlikely
Outlook\ngood
Signs point\nto yes
Without\na doubt
Yes
Yes,\ndefinitely
You may\nrely on it
Reply hazy,\ntry again
Ask again\nlater
Better not\ntell you now
Cannot\npredict now
Concentrate\nand ask again
Don\'t count\non it
My reply\nis no
My sources\nsay no
Outlook\nnot so good
Very\ndoubtful

string-array.name: donation_prompts
string-array.item: The stars whisper: support the one who conjured me.
The oracle thrives on kindness — support its maker?
A cosmic favor: help the creator keep the magic alive.
The spirits nudge you toward the one who made me.
Fate smiles wider on those who support my creator.
The universe hints: a small gift for my maker?
My visions flow freely — perhaps a coin for their keeper?
The constellations ask a kindness for my creator.
Magic has a price — support the hand that shaped me.
The heavens favor generous souls — aid my maker?
Destiny remembers those who support the dreamer behind me.
The moon requests a token for the one who built me.
